title: Minty Crunchy Fried Chicken Fingers
description: Crispy fried chicken fingers with a refreshing minty twist. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a shallow dish, mix together flour, crushed peppercorns, and crunchy garnish.
Dip each chicken finger into the buttermilk, coating completely, then roll in the peppercorn coating to coat.
Place the coated chicken fingers in the hot oil and fry for 5-6 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the chicken fingers from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle chopped fresh mint leaves over the top of the chicken fingers.
